evf.settings.bridge_url.name: Bridge URL
evf.settings.bridge_url.hint: Full origin of the EvenFoundryVTT bridge (e.g. https://bridge.example.com:8910). Must match your bridge deployment.
evf.settings.bridge_internal_secret.name: Bridge internal secret
evf.settings.bridge_internal_secret.hint: The bridge's EVF_INTERNAL_SECRET value. Used to authenticate this world's pushes to the bridge. Keep this secret.
evf.settings.bridge_config_hint: Set and review the bridge URL and internal secret for this world.
evf.settings.map_contrast_normalize.name: Map contrast normalization (glasses)
evf.settings.map_contrast_normalize.hint: Auto-stretch dark map scenes for readable contrast on the glasses before dithering. Disable to send raw brightness.
evf.settings.map_dither.name: Map dithering (glasses)
evf.settings.map_dither.hint: Apply a Bayer 4x4 ordered dither to the map greyscale: gradients render as a stippled pattern instead of flat bands. Off = clean flat tones (default). Applies immediately.
evf.settings.stream_consent.name: Allow streaming my view (glasses)
evf.settings.stream_consent.hint: Opt in to let your character's REAL view (vision + lighting + fog of war) be shown on the glasses in 'Selected PC' mode. A headless session joins as your user with no password. Off by default — only you decide. Manage this in the browser where you enable it.
evf.settings.map_brightness.name: Map brightness (glasses)
evf.settings.map_brightness.hint: Luma gain from −100 to +100 (0 = neutral). Brightens or darkens the map shown on the glasses without changing scene lighting — useful to tune the fixed-brightness G2 display. Applies immediately.
evf.settings.capture_fps.name: Map capture frame rate (fps)
evf.settings.capture_fps.hint: How many map frames per second are captured and streamed to the glasses (1–60). Higher = smoother map, more GPU and bandwidth. Default 30 fps. Changes take effect immediately without reload.
evf.settings.map_webp_quality.name: Map frame compression (WebP quality)
evf.settings.map_webp_quality.hint: 0 = lossless PNG (DEFAULT — best for the 16-level map; ~14 Mbit/s at 30 fps). 1–100 = lossy WebP, but on already-quantized frames it barely shrinks (≈1.1× at 75, larger than PNG at 90). Use ≈50 only if bandwidth is tight. Applies immediately; falls back to PNG without a WebP encoder.
evf.settings.map_auto_frame.name: Auto-frame the party (glasses map)
evf.settings.map_auto_frame.hint: OFF (default, recommended): the glasses mirror the GM's live viewport with correct lighting. ON (experimental): auto-frames all player-character tokens centered on the selected PC, BUT Foundry's lighting/vision/fog are view-dependent and become MISALIGNED in this off-view render — use only on scenes without dynamic lighting. Correct framing+lighting needs the headless player session (ADR-0015). Applies immediately.
evf.bridgecfg.title: EvenFoundryVTT — Bridge Configuration
evf.bridgecfg.url.label: Bridge URL
evf.bridgecfg.url.hint: Full origin of the EvenFoundryVTT bridge (e.g. https://bridge.example.com:8910). Must match your bridge deployment.
evf.bridgecfg.secret.label: Bridge internal secret
evf.bridgecfg.secret.hint: The bridge's EVF_INTERNAL_SECRET value. Authenticates this world's pushes to the bridge. Keep this secret.
evf.bridgecfg.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL including scheme and port (e.g. https://bridge.example.com:8910).
evf.pair.modal.title: EvenFoundryVTT — Pair a G2 Device
evf.pair.copy.instruction: Open the EvenFoundryVTT app on the phone and, on the "Enter your access token" step, paste these values.
evf.pair.qr.expired.title: Pair Token Expired
evf.pair.qr.expired.body: This token has expired. Click "New Code" to generate a fresh 24-hour pairing code.
evf.pair.table.heading: Paired Devices
evf.pair.table.empty.heading: No devices paired yet.
evf.pair.table.empty.body: Click "New Code" to generate your first pairing code.
evf.pair.revoke.confirm.body: Revoke this device? All active sessions will be disconnected.
evf.pair.revoke.error.bridge_unreachable: Could not revoke — bridge unreachable. Try again or reload module settings.
